description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with three stages: vars, build, and release. In the vars stage add a job named vars that runs on ruby:3.2.2-alpine, uses a bundler cache, executes a before_script installing bundler and dependencies, then echoes the latest changelog version into a vars file, sources it, validates that a tag matches the changelog version, and stores the vars file as a one‑hour artifact. In the build stage add three jobs (build:branch, build:master, build:tag) all using alvrme/alpine-android:android-33-jdk17 with a Gradle cache (key build) and a before_script that sets GRADLE_USER_HOME, writes sdk.dir and sentry.properties, installs curl and bash, sources vars, computes VERSION_CODE and VERSION_NAME, and prints vars; each job uploads the app/build/reports and APK outputs as 30‑day artifacts, with build:branch running on any branch except tags, executing ./gradlew ktlintCheck lint testPlayDebug testFossDebug assembleFossDebug, renaming the debug APK, and calling ./slacknotify.sh while defining a debug environment pointing to a Slack URL; build:master runs only on the master branch of foodsharing-dev/foodsharing-android, decodes a keystore from $STORE_FILE_CONTENTS, runs gradle tasks including assemblePlayBeta and assembleFossBeta, and uses the same artifacts and cache; build:tag runs only on tags, decodes the keystore, runs gradle tasks including assemblePlayRelease and assembleFossRelease, and also uses the same artifacts and cache. In the release stage add release:beta and release:release jobs that run on ruby:3.2.2-alpine with a bundler cache, update fastlane, source vars, decode $GOOGLE_KEY_CONTENTS into app/google-key.json, generate a changelog file for the current $VERSION_CODE, and invoke fastlane beta or fastlane release respectively, limited to master (beta) or tags (release) and setting LANG and LC_ALL variables, and add a release:create_release job using the gitlab.org/release-cli image that runs only on tags and creates a GitLab release with the tag name and description from $CI_COMMIT_TAG.
